originalCode:
# Augment Extend — Central Install

**11 rules · 98 skills · 38 agents** — Superpowers + ECC + Caveman + Custom + UI/UX

---

## Install

```bash
# 1. Clone to temporary location
git clone https://github.com/phcngyn99/augment-extend ~/Downloads/augment-extend

# 2. Run install script
cd ~/Downloads/augment-extend
./install.sh

# 3. Delete staging clone
rm -rf ~/Downloads/augment-extend
```

**Done.** Installed to `~/.augment` with git initialized.

---

## Update

```bash
cd ~/.augment && git pull
```

---

## What You Get

- **Rules (11)**: caveman-activate, superpowers-priority, session-lifecycle, coding-principles, karpathy-guidelines, security-principles, agentic-workflow, codegraph-priority, context-md-usage, research-delegation, honest-feedback
- **Skills (98)**: Superpowers (15), ECC (68), Caveman (7), Custom (7), UI/UX (1)
- **Agents (38)**: Superpowers code-reviewer + 37 ECC agents (language reviewers, build resolvers, domain specialists)
- **MCP**: codegraph, Context7, sequential-thinking

---

## Verify

```bash
echo "Rules:  $(ls ~/.augment/rules/*.md | wc -l) (expect 11)"
echo "Skills: $(find ~/.augment/skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l) (expect 98)"
echo "Agents: $(find ~/.augment/agents -name '*.md' | wc -l) (expect 38)"
```

---

## Docs

- **CATALOG.md** — searchable skill/agent reference
- **~/.augment/skills/\*/SKILL.md** — individual skill docs

# Augment Extend — Central Install

11 rules · 98 skills · 38 agents — Superpowers + ECC + Caveman + Custom + UI/UX

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/phcngyn99/augment-extend ~/Downloads/augment-extend
cd ~/Downloads/augment-extend && ./install.sh
rm -rf ~/Downloads/augment-extend  # clean up staging clone
```

Installed to `~/.augment` with git initialized.

## Update

```bash
cd ~/.augment && git pull
```

## What You Get

**Rules (11):** caveman, superpowers-priority, session-lifecycle, coding-principles, karpathy, security, agentic-workflow, codegraph-priority, context-md, research-delegation, honest-feedback

**Skills (98):** Superpowers (15), ECC (68), Caveman (7), Custom (7), UI/UX (1)

**Agents (38):** code-reviewer + 37 ECC (lang reviewers, build resolvers, domain specialists)

**MCP:** codegraph, Context7, sequential-thinking

## Verify

```bash
echo "Rules:  $(ls ~/.augment/rules/*.md | wc -l)"
echo "Skills: $(find ~/.augment/skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l)"
echo "Agents: $(find ~/.augment/agents -name '*.md' | wc -l)"
```

See **CATALOG.md** for full skill/agent reference.
